type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Historically, the emission factor used has been estimated from AP-42 Table 9.13.3-2 for a continuous deep fat fryer-potato chips. The emission factor has been updated to take the emission factor from the same table for a continuous deep fat fryer with mist pad eliminator - other snack chips to better reflect the site conditions.
